summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin OAuth Credential Management feature. All 21 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass. Admin can configure OAuth credentials for Meta, Etsy, TikTok, Google Ads platforms via UI. Non-admin users correctly get 403 on admin endpoints and don't see the admin section in UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin OAuth credential management is fully functional. Shopify credentials come from env vars (shows 'ENV' badge). Other platforms can be configured via admin UI (shows 'Configured' badge after saving). Non-admin users cannot access admin endpoints (403) and don't see the admin section in UI.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/admin/oauth/credentials (admin): PASS - Returns all 7 platforms with credential status
backend_api_tests.POST /api/admin/oauth/credentials (admin: PASS - Saves encrypted credentials for platform
backend_api_tests.GET /api/oauth/platforms: PASS - Reflects oauth_ready status after credentials saved
backend_api_tests.Save credentials validation: PASS - Returns 400 for unknown platform or empty values

frontend_ui_tests.Configure button opens inline form: PASS - Shows client_id and client_secret inputs
frontend_ui_tests.Delete button removes credentials: PASS - Badge changes back to 'Not set'

features_verified: GET /api/admin/oauth/credentials - returns all platform credential statuses (requires admin auth)
POST /api/admin/oauth/credentials - saves encrypted credentials for a platform (requires admin auth)
DELETE /api/admin/oauth/credentials/{platform} - removes stored credentials (requires admin auth)
POST /api/admin/oauth/credentials/{platform}/test - tests credential readiness (requires admin auth)
Non-admin user gets 403 on all admin OAuth endpoints
GET /api/oauth/platforms - reflects updated oauth_ready status after credentials are saved
Admin OAuth section visible on /settings/connections for admin user
Admin OAuth section NOT visible for non-admin user (demo user)
Configure button opens inline form with client_id and client_secret fields
Saving credentials updates the badge to 'Configured'
Shopify shows 'ENV' badge since it's configured via env vars
Login flow works for both admin and demo users
